calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Continued To Jun-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shari Marks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Connecting Point Communications LLC.
Lisa Richardson, Accountant for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Soma Networks, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on January 25, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Connecting Point Communications, LLC, and against the defaulted Defendant Soma Networks, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,938.24.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,925.34.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $480.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $44,348.58.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
